     parser.add_argument('--model_name', type=str, default='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14')

     parser.add_argument('--dropout', type=float, default=0.1)

     parser.add_argument('--label_smoothing', type=float, default=0.1)

+    parser.add_argument('--resume', type=str, default=None, help='Path to checkpoint to resume from')

     args = parser.parse_args()

     

     os.makedirs(args.checkpoint_dir, exist_ok=True)

@@ -194,6 +193,23 @@
         dropout=args.dropout

     )

     

+    start_epoch = 0

+    best_val_acc = 0.0

+    

+    if args.resume and os.path.exists(args.resume):

+        print(f'Resuming from {args.resume}', flush=True)

+        ckpt = torch.load(args.resume, map_location='cpu')

+        # Check for NaN in state dict

+        state_dict = ckpt['model_state_dict']

+        has_nan = any(torch.isnan(v).any() for v in state_dict.values() if v.dtype.is_floating_point)

+        if has_nan:

+            print('WARNING: Checkpoint has NaN weights, starting fresh!', flush=True)

+        else:

+            model.load_state_dict(state_dict)

+            start_epoch = ckpt.get('epoch', 0)

+            best_val_acc = ckpt.get('val_acc', 0.0)

+            print(f'Resumed from epoch {start_epoch}, best_val_acc={best_val_acc:.4f}', flush=True)

+    

     if n_gpus > 1:

         model = nn.DataParallel(model)

     model = model.to(device)
